text: I was lambasted by a GP at a surgery when I asked if it was possible that endeometriosis was still active at age 69. Bowel issues and kept giving me laxatives. I moved house and different area and surgery and a year later age 70 have now been referred for bowel ct scan with contrast after a failed coloncoscopy. I had a previous bowel resection and my bladder was stuck to my bowel. Full hysterectomy and all this surgery was done when I was mid 30s.
